title: Selling Digital Products Without PayPal: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: PayPal and Stripe do not make their exclusion lists public. They do not send you a letter explaining why your country is blocked. You find out when your account gets flagged, your funds get held for 180 days, or your application is rejected with a generic error message. Gumroad has payout delays that stretch to 30 days for sellers in certain regions, and Payhip quietly limits withdrawal options based on geography. These are not edge cases — they are the designed experience for creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Kenya, Ethiopia, and dozens of other countries. The solution is not a workaround. It is a different infrastructure stack entirely: crypto payments through NOWPayments, automated delivery, and a store that no platform can suspend because no platform owns it.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are well-known platforms, but they come with restrictive policies. PayPal, for example, restricts 29 countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. These platforms require KYC verification, which can be a hurdle for many creators. In contrast, NOWPayments, our payment processor, supports 300+ coins and has no KYC requirements. This means you can sell digital products without the need for KYC verification or a buyer account.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe have strict country policies, limiting access to digital sales for many creators. Gumroad and Payhip have their own restrictions as well. In contrast, NOWPayments is a crypto-native payment processor that supports 300+ coins and has no KYC requirements. This means you can sell digital products to customers in restricted countries without worrying about payment processing limitations. Our Core Engine, part of the Full Stack Bundle, handles automated delivery and payment verification, ensuring a seamless experience for both creators and customers.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Traditional payment gateways like PayPal and Stripe come with fees that can eat into your profits. Gumroad and Payhip also have their own fee structures. In contrast, NOWPayments has competitive fees and fast payment processing times. Our Web3 Wallet Connect, part of the Full Stack Bundle, enables multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds, ensuring you get the best exchange rates for your digital sales. With NOWPayments and our infrastructure, you can focus on creating and selling digital products without worrying about payment processing costs.
Traditional payment gateways can limit your access to digital sales in restricted countries.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Traditional payment gateways can be clunky and require manual intervention. Gumroad and Payhip have their own automation limitations. In contrast, our Core Engine and Admin Dashboard, part of the Full Stack Bundle, handle automated delivery and payment verification, ensuring a seamless experience for both creators and customers. With our infrastructure, you can focus on creating and selling digital products without worrying about payment processing and delivery complexities.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're in a restricted country or prefer a KYC-free payment experience, NOWPayments is the way to go. Our Full Stack Bundle provides a complete store infrastructure, including the Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, plus priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide. This means you can sell digital products without the need for traditional payment gateways or KYC verification. With our infrastructure, you can focus on creating and selling digital products without worrying about payment processing limitations.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
NOWPayments is the best PayPal alternative for creators in restricted countries due to its no-KYC policy and support for 300+ coins.
